description: Mark entries as forgotten. Sets superseded_by to the entry's own ID, distinguishing forgotten entries from entries superseded by a replacement. Already-inactive entries are silently skipped. Maximum 100 IDs per request. Partial success is reported.

ids.description: Entry IDs to forget. Maximum 100 per request. Each ID is processed independently.

name: cx_forget

outputSchema.description: Forget receipt: disposition counts and per-row errors.
